alert_text: Outbound DNS queries every 30s to randomized subdomains of evil-domain.com from host workstation-47.
summary: Likely C2 beaconing from workstation-47 to evil-domain.com
recommendations: Isolate host; block domain at firewall; run AV; collect PCAP.

alert_text: Multiple failed SSH login attempts from 203.0.113.45 over 30 seconds targeting root accounts.
summary: Potential brute-force SSH activity from 203.0.113.45; review and block if malicious
recommendations: Block IP at firewall; check auth logs; enforce MFA; alert SOC.

alert_text: Endpoint detected download of suspicious executable from hxxp://malicious.example/download.exe to host WIN-SERVER-02.
summary: Malicious binary download observed on WIN-SERVER-02; high confidence
recommendations: Isolate host; quarantine file; perform full AV scan; preserve artifacts.

alert_text: Spear-phishing email with attachment 'Invoice.doc' from unknown@phish.example with embedded macro.
summary: Spear-phishing attempt delivering macro-enabled doc; user-targeted
recommendations: Block sender; remove message from mailboxes; reset accounts that clicked; educate user.

alert_text: PowerShell spawned cmd.exe and downloaded obfuscated script from drop.example on workstation-12.
summary: Suspicious PowerShell activity with remote downloader; likely post-exploitation
recommendations: Contain host; dump memory; collect script; run offline analysis; rebuild if confirmed.

alert_text: Local privilege escalation attempt observed against kernel driver module on linux-host-3 referencing CVE-2024-XXXXX.
summary: Attempt to exploit known kernel CVE on linux-host-3; requires patching
recommendations: Isolate host; apply vendor patches; check for persistence; escalate to infra.

alert_text: High-volume SYN flood outbound from several internal hosts toward 192.0.2.10 observed over 10 minutes.
summary: Potential DDoS/traffic amplification activity originating internally
recommendations: Rate-limit at border; identify internal sources; quarantine offending hosts; review for compromise.

alert_text: Large number of PUT requests to s3.amazonaws.com from service-account-12 uploading unusual archive files.
summary: Potential data exfiltration to external cloud storage via service-account-12
recommendations: Disable credentials; review S3 buckets; restore from backups; notify data owner.

alert_text: SSL certificate for api.example.com expires in 14 days.
summary: Expiring TLS certificate may cause service disruption if not renewed
recommendations: Renew certificate; validate chain; schedule rotation.

alert_text: WAF detected attempted exploitation of Apache Struts CVE-2017-5638 pattern against webapp-01.
summary: Exploit attempt matching CVE-2017-5638 signatures; high severity
recommendations: Block IP; apply WAF rule; patch Struts; review logs for successful exploit.

alert_text: Internal host 10.1.1.5 scanned 10,000 ports on 10.1.1.6 within 5 minutes.
summary: Aggressive internal port scan; possible reconnaissance
recommendations: Throttle/segregate host; monitor for additional reconnaissance; investigate user/process.

alert_text: DNS TXT lookups for randomized token strings to typosquatted-domain.com from host-23 observed repeatedly.
summary: DNS-based beaconing to typosquatted domain; suspicious automated activity
recommendations: Block domain; collect DNS logs; inspect host-23 for malware.

alert_text: Very long alert body: Large payload testing. "This is a repeated paragraph to test long text handling.""" """Repeated.""" """Repeated.""" """Repeated.""" """Repeated.""""
summary: Extremely long alert text exceeding typical limits to test text handling
recommendations: Truncate for display, but preserve full raw; ensure summarizer handles long input.

alert_text: Alerta: intento de acceso remoto sospechoso desde 203.0.113.45 detectado en servidor-DB.
summary: Acceso sospechoso detectado; requiere revisión local

alert_text: OSINT feed: very large indicator list to test ingestion limits (host1.example to host100.example).
summary: Very large indicator list from OSINT feed; tests parsing and storage
recommendations: Ensure DB field can store large lists; consider batching.

summary: Behavioral anomaly with no discrete IOCs; requires investigative analysis
recommendations: Increase logging; capture full network flow; look for lateral movement.
